likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma 2.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma 2.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform for Lisbon trains
phrases.text_local: De que plataforma parte o comboio para Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: DIH KIH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh PAH-ruh-tih AW koom-BOYOO PUH-ruh leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Lisbon-bound services on the West Line consistently use the main track, and staff confirm it directly.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma indicada no painel de partidas.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh een-dee-KAH-duh NOO peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the platform indicated on the departure board.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the platform indicated on the departure board.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh een-dee-KAH-duh NOO peye-NEHL DIH puh-ruh-TEE-duhsh.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma indicada no painel de partidas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to validate my ticket
phrases.text_local: Onde posso validar o meu bilhete de comboio?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket validation is strictly enforced in Portugal, with staff pointing travelers directly to the yellow or blue stamping units.

likely_response.local: Nas máquinas de validação, ao lado da bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN, OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: At the validation machines, next to the ticket counter.

responses.english: At the validation machines, next to the ticket counter.
responses.phonetic: NUHSH MAH-kee-nuhsh DIH vuh-lee-duh-SOWN, OW LAH-doo DUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.local: Nas máquinas de validação, ao lado da bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which platform for Lisbon trains
phrases.text_local: Qual é a plataforma para os comboios para Lisboa?
phrases.pronunciation: KWAHL EH AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh PUH-ruh OOSH koom-BOYOOSH PUH-ruh leezh-BOHUH?
phrases.cultural_note: Lisbon trains depart from the main platform at this station.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao atendente da estação.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DUH shtuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, ask the station attendant.

responses.english: Good morning, ask the station attendant.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW uh-tayng-DAYNG-tih DUH shtuh-SOWN.
responses.local: Bom dia, pergunte ao atendente da estação.

phrases.cultural_note: Platform 2 serves secondary line services at Óbidos station.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma 2.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.

responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma 2.

phrases.text_local: Onde se localiza exatamente a plataforma dois?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH loo-kuh-LEE-zuh eh-zuh-tuh-MAYNG-tih AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese railway staff typically give concise, track-specific directions without extra navigation details.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma dois.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to platform two.

responses.english: Follow the signs to platform two.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH pluh-tuh-FAW-ruh-muh DOYSH.
responses.local: Siga as placas para a plataforma dois.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica o balcão de atendimento da CP?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW bahl-KOWN DIH uh-tayng-dee-MAYNG-too DUH seh-PEH?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a bilheteira da CP.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh DUH seh-PEH.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the CP ticket counter.
